name: Skin of the Ancients
description: An Eridian E-tech relic that blends elemental resistance with shield improvements, effectively combining the roles of Resistance and Protection relics. It is a strong all-purpose defensive option when you want layered survivability instead of a single narrow stat boost.
notes:
It drops from Legendary Loot Midgets.

It always rolls at least two effects and no more than four. Those effects can include one to three resistance bonuses plus one or two shield bonuses.

special.description: Grants one to three damage resistances, including physical, fire, shock, corrosive, or explosive, and also provides one or two shield bonuses such as capacity or recharge rate, for a maximum of four total effects.
